records.title: Explicit formula for the discrete Laplace transform of the Möbius function, related special functions, and a criterion for the Riemann hypothesis
records.resultSummary: Assuming simple zeta zeros, gives an explicit formula for the Möbius discrete Laplace transform; an O(x⁻¹ᐟ²) bound implies RH, while the converse needs additional hypotheses on the zeros.

sourceReview.note: The explicit formula assumes simple zeros. The stated RH criterion is one-way unconditionally; this paper is not a standalone unconditional proof of RH.

records.title: Averages of diagonal Elliott-Halberstam problem twisted by Möbius function with Sobolev and Hölder-Zygmund weights
A decades-long breakthrough in zero-density estimates and primes in short intervals
A Gaussian–Perron Prime-Side Defect and Local Profiles Near Critical-Line Zeros of the Riemann Zeta Function
A finite Guinand–Weil dictionary and archimedean tail order for the truncated Weil quadratic form
Distribution of Selmer ranks in prime cyclic extensions
records.resultSummary: Assuming the Extended Riemann Hypothesis, studies Selmer-rank distributions in cyclic p-extensions and derives probabilistic rank bounds for elliptic, superelliptic, and hyperelliptic curves.

sourceReview.note: This is a conditional study of Selmer ranks, not a contour-shifting or error-term result for H14. Its former H14 classification was unsupported and has been changed to Context only.
